etymology.description: 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant") + 合(合) (hé, "combine") = plant + phonetic 合 -> reply
etymology.interpretation: The character 荅(dá) combines 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant") for the semantic element related to plant life, and 合(合) (hé, "combine") to provide the phonetic component, suggesting the concept of a plant showing a particular response or reply.
